title: Warden JSONL Output
description: Schema for a single line in Warden's JSONL output. Each line is one of: skill record, summary record, or fix-evaluation record.

RunMetadata.description: Metadata common to every JSONL record.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the run started.

durationMs.description: Total wall-clock duration of the run in milliseconds.

cwd.description: Working directory where warden was invoked.

UsageStats.description: Token usage and cost from an LLM call.

cacheReadInputTokens.description: Input tokens served from cache. Omitted when zero.

cacheCreationInputTokens.description: Input tokens that created new cache entries. Omitted when zero.

path.description: File path relative to the repository root.

endLine.description: Ending line number (1-based). Omitted for single-line findings.

SuggestedFix.description: A suggested code fix for a finding.

diff.description: Unified diff of the suggested change.

Finding.description: A single finding from a skill analysis.

confidence.description: Confidence level. Omitted when not assessed.

location.description: Source location. Omitted for findings without a specific location.

suggestedFix.description: Suggested fix. Omitted when no fix is available.

elapsedMs.description: Time elapsed since skill start when this finding was produced. Omitted when not tracked.

FileRecord.description: Per-file breakdown within a skill record.

filename.description: File path relative to the repository root.

findings.description: Number of findings in this file.

durationMs.description: Analysis duration for this file. Omitted when not tracked.

usage.description: Token usage for this file. Omitted when not tracked.

BySeverity.description: Finding counts broken down by severity level.

FixEvalDetail.description: Per-comment evaluation result in fix evaluation.

path.description: File path of the evaluated comment.

line.description: Line number of the evaluated comment.

reasoning.description: LLM reasoning for the verdict. Present for attempted_failed.

durationMs.description: Duration of this evaluation in milliseconds.

SkillRecord.description: One skill's analysis results. Discriminated by having a 'skill' field and no 'type' field.

skill.description: Skill name that produced this record.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the skill's findings.

metadata.description: Arbitrary skill metadata. Omitted when empty.

usage.description: Aggregate token usage for the skill.

auxiliaryUsage.description: Usage from auxiliary LLM calls (extraction repair, semantic dedup). Keys are agent names, values are UsageStats. Omitted when no auxiliary calls occurred.

files.description: Per-file breakdown. Omitted when not available.

skippedFiles.description: Files skipped due to chunking patterns. NOT YET WRITTEN by writeJsonlReport().

failedHunks.description: Number of hunks that failed to analyze (SDK/API errors). NOT YET WRITTEN by writeJsonlReport().

failedExtractions.description: Number of hunks where findings extraction failed (parse errors). NOT YET WRITTEN by writeJsonlReport().

SummaryRecord.description: Aggregate summary across all skills. Always the last line in a JSONL file.

usage.description: Aggregate token usage across all skills.

auxiliaryUsage.description: Merged auxiliary usage across all skills. Omitted when no auxiliary calls occurred.

FixEvaluationRecord.description: Fix evaluation results for unresolved PR comments. Defined but not yet wired to JSONL output.

evaluated.description: Number of comments sent to LLM for evaluation.

resolved.description: Number of comments where the fix was confirmed.

needsAttention.description: Number of comments where the fix attempt failed.

skipped.description: Number of comments not evaluated (no patches, over limit).

failedEvaluations.description: Number of evaluations that failed (API errors, invalid responses).

usage.description: Aggregate usage from all fix evaluations.

evaluations.description: Per-comment evaluation details. Omitted when empty.
